rationale: Educ. Code §37.017 governs destruction of criminal-justice records held by school districts. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Information received by a school district under Article 15.27, Code of Criminal Procedure, may not be attached to the permanent academic file of the student who is the subject of the report.
_note: No conflict: the cited statute concerns student record destruction, unrelated to homestead exemption appraisal thresholds.
